ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the area */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough in which the zip code is located (e.g., QUEENS, BROOKLYN) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the zip code */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood in which the zip code is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City in which the zip code is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the zip code is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zip code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zip code */,
  "land_area_sqmi" REAL /* Land area in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evictions" (
  "eviction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eviction record */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "evictions" INTEGER /* Total number of evictions in the zip code */,
  "evictions_per_thousand_ppl" REAL /* Number of evictions per thousand people in the zip code */,
  "eviction_type" TEXT /* Type of eviction (e.g., residential, commercial, etc.) */,
  "eviction_cause" TEXT /* Cause of eviction (e.g., non-payment, lease expiration, etc.) */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court that handled the eviction */,
  "court_address" TEXT /* Address of the court that handled the eviction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eviction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evictions_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation record */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "violations" INTEGER /* Total number of violations in the zip code */,
  "violations_per_thousand_ppl" REAL /* Number of violations per thousand people in the zip code */,
  "open_violations_per_thousand_ppl" REAL /* Number of open violations per thousand people in the zip code */,
  "closed_violations_per_thousand_ppl" REAL /* Number of closed violations per thousand people in the zip code */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation (e.g., building, zoning, etc.) */,
  "violation_description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code */,
  "pct_hispanic_or_latino" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic or Latino population */,
  "pct_asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian population */,
  "pct_american_indian_and_alaska_native" REAL /* Percentage of American Indian and Alaska Native population */,
  "pct_black_or_african_american" REAL /* Percentage of Black or African American population */,
  "pct_white" REAL /* Percentage of White population */,
  "pct_native_hawaiian_and_other_pacific_islander" REAL /* Percentage of Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander population */,
  "pct_some_other_race" REAL /* Percentage of Some Other Race population */,
  "pct_two_or_more_races" REAL /* Percentage of Two or More Races population */,
  "pct_black_and_hispanic" REAL /* Percentage of Black and Hispanic population */,
  "pct_below_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of population below the poverty line */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "median_home_value" INTEGER /* Median home value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, data analyst, community leader) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "zip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code the report is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., eviction analysis, demographic analysis) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_zip_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, fulfilled, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
